features.name: nested parameterized class with implicit default type
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class where a type parameter defaults to another parameterized class using implicit empty argument list

features.name: type equivalence of implicit and explicit default type parameters
features.description: Code should include two typedefs where one uses implicit default and the other uses explicit equivalent default for the same nested parameterized class
features.snippet:
typedef Holder#()         H_imp_t;
typedef Holder#(W#(int))  H_exp_t;

features.name: cast between implicit and explicit default parameterized types
features.description: Code should include a $cast operation between variables typed with implicit default and explicit equivalent default parameterized class
